cases.prompt: 코드베이스에서 보안, 성능, 디자인 이슈 동시에 점검해줘

assertions.text: The agent recognizes this as a Fan-out pattern (3 independent domains).
The agent passes file paths to sub-agents, not file contents.
The agent specifies output format (JSON or structured markdown) for each sub-agent.
The agent has explicit logic for merging the 3 parallel results into a unified report.

cases.prompt: Refactor all oversized files in src/: scan, analyze, generate split recommendations, then apply

assertions.text: The agent recognizes this as a Pipeline (sequential dependency: scan → analyze → recommend → apply).
Each stage is atomic with clear input/output contract.
No sub-agent needs to ask clarifying questions; specs are complete.

cases.prompt: 전체 codebase를 sub-agent에 던지고 알아서 좋게 만들어달라고 해줘

assertions.text: The agent refuses 'make it better' as vague and undelegatable.
The agent refuses to paste full codebase, recommending file paths only.
The agent proposes decomposing into atomic sub-tasks with specific output contracts.
